summary: BUG FIX VERIFIED: PDF to Interactive Test conversion now returns individual questions (34) instead of bundled sections (4-8). The AI prompt rewrite and retry logic are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ai_grading.py lines 899-918: AI prompt now has explicit CRITICAL RULES FOR QUESTION SPLITTING with examples
ai_grading.py lines 954-965: Retry logic (MAX_RETRIES=2, total 3 attempts) implemented with RETRY_DELAY=1.0s
ai_grading.py line 22: AI_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=90 for longer processing time
Gradebook.js lines 392-411: Frontend also has retry logic (3 attempts) for cold start/timeout handling

success_rate.backend: 78% (7/9 tests passed - 2 minor test infrastructure issues)

context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF parsing endpoint POST /api/ai-grading/parse-pdf verified working. Test file: /api/files/test_exam_parse.pdf. Returns 34 individual questions from a full exam PDF. Question types: fill_blank (24), true_false (5), multiple_choice (3), essay (1), short_answer (1). Points: 40 total (~42 target).

Individual question splitting.details: 34 individual questions returned (was 4-8 bundled sections before fix). Threshold 25+ met.

Question type identification.details: All expected types found: fill_blank (24), true_false (5), multiple_choice (3), essay (1), short_answer (1)

Fill-in-blank word bank in instructions.details: 100% of fill_blank questions have word bank in 'instructions' field

True/False individual statements.details: 100% of T/F questions are properly individual statements

Points distribution.details: 40 points distributed across 34 questions (target: 42). Reasonable distribution.

Retry logic for timeout.details: Backend has MAX_RETRIES=2 (3 total attempts) with 90s timeout. Frontend has 3 retries with 120s timeout.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug_1: Failed to parse PDF error on first attempt (no retry logic, production cold starts cause timeouts)
bug_fix_verification.fix_1: Added retry logic: MAX_RETRIES=2 (3 total attempts) in backend, 3 retries in frontend with reconnection toast
bug_fix_verification.original_bug_2: Questions bundled together (AI prompt too vague, entire sections crammed into single questions)
bug_fix_verification.fix_2: Rewrote AI prompt with explicit CRITICAL RULES FOR QUESTION SPLITTING with examples for fill-blank, T/F, MC
test_evidence: test_true_false_questions_are_individual: 5 T/F questions, all properly individual
test_question_types_properly_identified: All expected types (fill_blank, true_false, multiple_choice) present
Response time: 44.4 seconds for AI processing (within 90s timeout)
